{{Expand}}

{{Infobox location
| name = Pioneer world
| introduced = Threshold: Stories from Cradle
}}

== Threshold: Stories from Cradle ==
{{spoiler|book=cradle-13-threshold|The people of the [[Pioneer world]] were taken from [[Abidan]]-settled [[Iterations]], specifically [[Sanctum]].<ref name="cradle-13-threshold-c6">''Threshold: Stories from Cradle'', chapter 6</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-13-threshold|[[Jek’nan]] has been embedded in the heart of this [[Pioneer world]] since the [[Abidan Collapse]].<ref name="cradle-13-threshold-c6" />}}

== Notes ==
<references />

{{Cradle nav}}

[[Category:Locations]]
[[Category:Threshold: Stories from Cradle]]
[[Category:Cradle]]
[[Category:Cradle locations]]
[[Category:Regions]]
